notes: Adds full support for the Imu / Five Elders deck: Five Elders (OP13-082) now wipes your board and replays unique Five Elders from your trash, St. Marcus Mars and The Empty Throne resolve correctly, St. Shepherd Ju Peter applies its 7000 base-power aura at 10+ trash, and Imu opens a start-of-game Stage selection. New game-start experience: a coin-flip animation where the winner chooses first or second, the first/second indicator on the mulligan screen, and an animated mulligan (hand returns to deck and shuffles). Rules: the 6th-character rule now works for effect-driven plays (you choose which Character to play over on a full board), 'rested by your effect' triggers work, and multiple On Play effects resolve one card at a time. Bots: the Advanced bot no longer wastes a removal event with no legal target (for example against removal-immune Five Elders), plus search and evaluation improvements. Connectivity: the Connecting screen now has a timeout and Cancel button, custom lobbies connect reliably, casual is no longer mislabeled as ranked, and version-mismatched matches abort cleanly. Account: password recovery is fixed and adds a confirm-password field. Interface: valid targets keep their green highlight on hover, and the deck-look screen scales to fit many cards. New: right-click any card in a match to report a bug with the exact game state attached.
